name: trustledger
description: TrustLedger is a Solidity-based smart contract system for secure escrow-based transactions built on the Ethereum blockchain, with commit-reveal arbitration, Chainlink VRF juror selection, and on-chain reputation on Sepolia.
author: Kevin Le <https://www.linkedin.com/in/lekevin1>

scripts.hardhat:check-balance: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/check-balance.ts --network sepolia
scripts.hardhat:deploy:local: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
scripts.hardhat:deploy:sepolia: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.hardhat:wire-reputation:sepolia: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/wire-reputation-registry.ts --network sepolia
scripts.start:deploy:local: npm run compile && (npm run node &) && sleep 2 && npm run hardhat:deploy:local
scripts.start:deploy:dry-run: npm run foundry:build && npm run foundry:deploy:sepolia:dry-run
scripts.start:deploy:hardhat: npm run compile && npm run hardhat:deploy:sepolia
scripts.start:deploy:foundry: npm run foundry:build && npm run foundry:deploy:sepolia
scripts.lint: npm run lint:config && npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:js && npm run lint:py && npm run lint:styles && npm run lint:knip && npm run lint:sol && npm run lint:forge && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:cursor && npm run lint:k8s && npm run lint:logs
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run foundry:build && npm run build:rust && npm run build:solana && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run foundry:test && npm run hardhat:test && npm run test:frontend:unit
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:hardhat && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.impeccable: npm run doctor && npm run lint:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.ci:typescript: npm run contracts:vendor:check && npm run secrets:check && npm run compile && npm run logs:check && npm run tmp:check && npx tsc -p tsconfig.hardhat.json --noEmit && npm run lint:config && npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sol && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:cursor && npm run lint:k8s && npm run lint:logs && npm run docs:nav:check && npm run i18n:scan && npx prettier --check .
scripts.quality: npm run secrets:check && npm run docs:nav:check && npm run analytics:check && npm run logs:check && npm run tmp:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run i18n:scan && npm run test
scripts.quality:all: npm run quality && npm run build && npm run impeccable && npm run docs:build && npm run docs:links
scripts.fix: npm run fix:ts && npm run fix:prettier && npm run fix:frontend
scripts.lint:forge: cd contracts && forge fmt --check && forge lint src test script --ignored-error-codes 3420
scripts.docker:build: npm run docker:storage:prune && docker compose build && npm run docker:storage:prune
scripts.docker:test: npm run docker:storage:prune && docker compose run --rm test && npm run docker:storage:prune
scripts.docker:frontend:build: npm run docker:storage:prune && docker compose --profile frontend build frontend && npm run docker:storage:prune
scripts.docker:frontend:test: npm run docker:storage:prune && docker compose run --rm frontend-test && npm run docker:storage:prune
scripts.secrets:check: npm run secrets:paths && npm run secrets:gitleaks
scripts.lint:js: eslint -c eslint.scripts.config.mjs 'scripts/**/*.js' tools/ensure-doc-navigation.mjs tools/check-sensitive-files.mjs tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs tools/check-docker-storage.mjs
scripts.foundry:deploy:sepolia: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url sepolia --private-key "$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY" --broadcast --verify -vvvv
scripts.foundry:deploy:sepolia:dry-run: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url sepolia --private-key "$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY" -vvvv
scripts.demo:good: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/demo/demo-good.ts --network localhost --no-compile
scripts.demo:bad: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/demo/demo-bad.ts --network localhost --no-compile
scripts.demo:jurors: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/demo/demo-jurors.ts --network localhost --no-compile
scripts.demo:scenario: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/demo/demo-scenarios.ts --network localhost --no-compile
scripts.demo:stablecoin: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.hardhat.json node tools/hardhat-local-cache.mjs run scripts/demo/demo-stablecoin.ts --network localhost --no-compile
scripts.cache:clear: npm run cache:clear:eslint && npm run cache:clear:prettier && npm run cache:clear:npm && npm run cache:clear:hardhat && npm run cache:clear:typechain
scripts.security:alerts: gh api repos/kevinle3212/TrustLedger/code-scanning/alerts?state=open --paginate | jq '[.[] | {number: .number, rule: .rule.id, severity: .rule.severity, description: .rule.description, file: .most_recent_instance.location.path, line: .most_recent_instance.location.start_line, url: .html_url}]'
scripts.security:dependabot: gh api repos/kevinle3212/TrustLedger/dependabot/alerts?state=open --paginate | jq '[.[] | {number: .number, package: .dependency.package.name, severity: .security_advisory.severity, summary: .security_advisory.summary, url: .html_url}]'
scripts.security: npm run security:alerts && npm run security:dependabot
